all.critique:
Below is a plain‐text critique of the analysis:

1. Alternating Update Clarity (Medium)  
 • The analysis does a good job explaining the alternating update mechanism based on (epoch mod (tau1+tau2) < tau1) and correctly points out that when tau1 is zero only the synthetic node features are updated.  
 • However, the write‐up vacillates slightly between “calling the optimizer’s step()” directly and the possibility of invoking helper methods like model.update_eigenbasis() or model.update_features(
